summary: ForceShareGate Character-Driven Auto-Share Prompt feature testing complete. All 10 features verified. Backend: 100% pass rate. Frontend: 100% pass rate. The modal correctly appears after viewing a completed job, displays character name 'Sage' in title/urgency/continue button, shows cliffhanger text, reward tiers +5/+15/+25, all share buttons, and skip functionality. SessionStorage flag prevents modal reappearance on same session. ShareRewardBar shows character-personalized 'Share Sage's story' text.
critical_code_review_comments: ForceShareGate.js uses createPortal to render at document.body - fixes position:fixed issue with parent transform
viewJob in StoryVideoPipeline.js now fetches full /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} to get characters and cliffhanger data
Backend /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns characters array from character_continuity and cliffhanger from episode_plan
PostGenPhase extracts characterName from job?.characters?.[0]?.name and cliffhanger from job?.cliffhanger
ShareRewardBar receives characterName and cliffhanger props and displays 'Share {charName}'s story'
SessionStorage flag 'force_share_{jobId}' prevents modal from reappearing on same session
Modal appears 2 seconds after uiState becomes READY
Skip button appears after 5 second countdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: ForceShareGate Character-Driven Auto-Share Prompt feature fully verified. All 10 test cases passed: (1) Modal appears after viewing completed job, (2) Character name 'Sage' in title, (3) Cliffhanger text about Sage being trapped, (4) Urgency line with character name, (5) Reward tiers +5/+15/+25, (6) Share buttons WhatsApp/X/Instagram/Copy Link, (7) Continue button says 'Continue Sage's Story', (8) Skip button after countdown, (9) SessionStorage flag prevents reappearance, (10) ShareRewardBar shows 'Share Sage's story'. Backend API /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns characters array and cliffhanger field correctly.

Feature_1_Modal_Appears_After_Viewing_Co.details: ForceShareGate modal appears 2 seconds after uiState becomes READY when viewing completed job b95498d4-2e2a-4472-8dac-f8a253d07dfd

Feature_2_Character_Name_In_Title.details: Modal title shows 'Sage's story isn't over yet...' with character name from job.characters[0].name

Feature_3_Cliffhanger_Text.details: Modal shows cliffhanger: 'Sage is trapped as the water rises, unsure if she will escape the cave in time.'

Feature_4_Urgency_Line_With_Character_Na.details: Urgency line shows 'Someone else might continue Sage's story first...'

Feature_5_Reward_Tiers.details: Reward breakdown shows +5 (you share), +15 (friend continues), +25 (friend signs up)

Feature_6_Share_Buttons.details: All 4 share buttons present: WhatsApp, X, Instagram, Copy Link

Feature_7_Continue_Story_Button.details: Continue button shows 'Continue Sage's Story' and navigates to ?remix=continue with toast notification

Feature_8_Skip_Button_After_Countdown.details: Skip button appears after 5 second countdown and dismisses modal when clicked

Feature_9_SessionStorage_Flag_Prevents_R.details: sessionStorage.getItem('force_share_b95498d4-2e2a-4472-8dac-f8a253d07dfd') returns '1' and modal does not reappear on same session

Feature_10_ShareRewardBar_Character_Pers.details: ShareRewardBar on postgen page shows 'Share Sage's story' with 'up to +45 credits' badge

Feature_11_Backend_API_Returns_Character.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/b95498d4-2e2a-4472-8dac-f8a253d07dfd returns characters: [{name:'Sage'},{name:'Owl'}] and cliffhanger field

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocking.
